name: TG THERAPEUTICS, INC.
summary: TG Therapeutics, Inc. is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the acquisition, development, and commercialization of novel treatments for B-cell diseases. Its lead approved product is BRIUMVI (ublituximab-xiiy) 150 mg/6 mL Injection for intravenous therapy, indicated for relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis (RMS) in the United States. The company also has additional product candidates in clinical development and relies on third-party manufacturers and licensors for its pipeline.

products.name: BRIUMVI (ublituximab-xiiy)
products.description: FDA-approved 150 mg/6 mL intravenous injection for treatment of relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis (RMS) in the United States.

partnerships.description: BRIUMVI and other product candidates are in-licensed from third parties; disputes or non-performance could adversely affect development and commercialization.
Company relies on collaboration and commercialization partners to develop, fund, manufacture, and commercialize drug products and product candidates.
Contracts with third parties for manufacture and testing of BRIUMVI for commercial supply and all clinical product supply.
